ddls:
CREATE TABLE "courses" (
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each course */,
  "code" TEXT /* Course code (e.g., 052372) */,
  "title" TEXT /* Course title (e.g., NEUROENGINEERING [C.I.]) */,
  "timetable" TEXT /* Timetable information (e.g., None, add, remove) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the course (e.g., MI) */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of course (e.g., I, M) */,
  "semester" INTEGER /* Semester the course is offered (e.g., 1, 2) */,
  "credits" REAL /* Number of credits the course is worth */,
  "cfu_group" INTEGER /* CFU group the course belongs to */,
  "prerequisites" TEXT /* List of course IDs that are prerequisites */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum number of students allowed in the course */,
  "enrolled_students" INTEGER /* Current number of enrolled students */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department the course belongs to */,
  "faculty_id" INTEGER /* ID of the faculty the course belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_courses_faculty_id FOREIGN KEY ("faculty_id") REFERENCES faculties ("faculty_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_courses_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("dept_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "dept_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the department (e.g., ING-INF/06) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the department */,
  "head_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department head */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the department */,
  "email" TEXT /* Contact email of the department */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dept_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "faculties" (
  "faculty_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each faculty */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the faculty */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the faculty */,
  "dean_id" INTEGER /* ID of the faculty dean */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the faculty */,
  "email" TEXT /* Contact email of the faculty */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("faculty_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "course_offerings" (
  "offering_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each course offering */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course being offered */,
  "semester" INTEGER /* Semester the course is being offered (e.g., 1, 2) */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the course is being offered */,
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instructor teaching the course */,
  "room_id" INTEGER /* ID of the room where the course is held */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the course */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the course */,
  "days_of_week" TEXT /* Days of the week when the course is held */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("offering_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_offerings_room_id FOREIGN KEY ("room_id") REFERENCES rooms ("room_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_offerings_instructor_id FOREIGN KEY ("instructor_id") REFERENCES instructors ("instructor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_offerings_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "instructors" (
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each instructor */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the instructor */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the instructor */,
  "dept_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department the instructor belongs to */,
  "title" TEXT /* Academic title of the instructor */,
  "office_location" TEXT /* Location of the instructor's office */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the instructor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instructor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_instructors_dept_id FOREIGN KEY ("dept_id") REFERENCES departments ("dept_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rooms" (
  "room_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each room */,
  "building" TEXT /* Building where the room is located */,
  "room_number" TEXT /* Room number */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum capacity of the room */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("room_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "students" (
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the student */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the student */,
  "major_id" INTEGER /* ID of the major the student is enrolled in */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_students_major_id FOREIGN KEY ("major_id") REFERENCES majors ("major_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "majors" (
  "major_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each major */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the major */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department the major belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("major_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_majors_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("dept_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "enrollments" (
  "enrollment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each enrollment */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student */,
  "offering_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course offering */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date when the student enrolled in the course */,
  "grade" TEXT /* Grade received by the student in the course */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("enrollment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrollments_offering_id FOREIGN KEY ("offering_id") REFERENCES course_offerings ("offering_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrollments_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)
